<!-- Installed by governance refresh; do not edit. Any change here is drift and is restored on the next refresh. Route changes through the toolkit owner. -->

Run the `decision` operator defined in this repo's `AGENTS.md` (Operator
Requests): record a settled, durable decision in `.agents/decisions.md` and
update affected guidance. `AGENTS.md` is the authoritative definition; this file
is only a pointer.
